description: Private account written by Nahray b. Nissim and Barhun b. Ishaq. mentions the year 452 AH (1060-61). Details about shipment of silk and linen cloths and a partnership in trading pearls. Mentions the news about the death of Isma’il b. Barhun al-Tāhartī. Also mentions that the trading with Sicily is still happens despite the events in the island. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #295) VMR
description_he: רשימה או טבלה מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
